rmk:
Regarding the qCF calls around 18,5 kHz.  Unsure about identification, best to keep it at *Eumops sp.*

It could possibly be the subspecies: *Eumops auripendulus auripendulus*

Identified by Sarah Mahie  and Boaz van Die while using the following sources:

- [Arias-Aguilar, Adriana & Hintze, Frederico & Aguiar, Ludmilla & Rufray, Vincent & Bernard, Enrico & Ramos Pereira, Maria João. (2018). Who’s calling? Acoustic identification of Brazilian bats. Mammal Research. 63. 10.1007/s13364-018-0367-z.](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/324708861_Who's_calling_Acoustic_identification_of_Brazilian_bats) + [Illustrated identification key to the calls of Brazilian bats](https://static-content.springer.com/esm/art%3A10.1007%2Fs13364-018-0367-z/MediaObjects/13364_2018_367_MOESM2_ESM.pdf)
